'''竏單-b-r-g''' ('''kadabregoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queak|queak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queak|queak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單-b-r-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadabregoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidabregoko || jidabregoko || shidabregoko || kidabregoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudabregoko || jujudabregoko || shushudabregoko || kukudabregoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudabregoko || judabregoko || shudabregoko || kudabregoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudabregoko || judabregoko || shudabregoko || kudabregoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedabregoko || jedabregoko || shedabregoko || kedabregoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodabregoko || jojodabregoko || shoshodabregoko || kokodabregoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodabregoko || jodabregoko || shodabregoko || kodabregoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodabregoko || jodabregoko || shodabregoko || kodabregoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dabregoko || dabregoko || dabregoko || dabregoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dabregoko || dabregoko || dabregoko || dabregoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dabregoko || dabregoko || dabregoko || dabregoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dabregoko || dabregoko || dabregoko || dabregoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦdabregoko || jﾃｦdabregoko || shﾃｦdabregoko || kﾃｦdabregoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadabregoko || jajadabregoko || shashadabregoko || kakadabregoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadabregoko || jadabregoko || shadabregoko || kadabregoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadabregoko || jadabregoko || shadabregoko || kadabregoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shadabregithi || shadabregiji || shadabregishi || shadabregiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || shadabreguthu || shadabreguju || shadabregushu || shadabreguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || shadabreguthu || shadabreguju || shadabregushu || shadabreguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || shadabreguthuf || shadabregujuf || shadabregushuf || shadabregukuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || shadabregethe || shadabregeje || shadabregeshe || shadabregeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || shadabregotho || shadabregojo || shadabregosho || shadabregoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || shadabregotho || shadabregojo || shadabregosho || shadabregoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || shadabregothof || shadabregojof || shadabregoshof || shadabregokof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf || shadabregﾃｯf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shadabregﾃｦthﾃｦ || shadabregﾃｦjﾃｦ || shadabregﾃｦshﾃｦ || shadabregﾃｦkﾃｦ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || shadabregatha || shadabregaja || shadabregasha || shadabregaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || shadabregatha || shadabregaja || shadabregasha || shadabregaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || shadabregathaf || shadabregajaf || shadabregashaf || shadabregakaf
|}
